# Staff of Nature
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Staff%20of%20Nature&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo|name = Staff of Nature|desc = A staff which holds the power of nature. Losing this staff might severely pollute the realm|rarity = a|slot = staff|tier = ST|minDmg = 65|maxDmg = 140|shots = 2|rof = 120|range2 = 9|fameb = 5|dropsFrom = drops from the god of reptilians}}

<noinclude>
{{NavStaves}}
</noinclude>
